pageInfo.pagePurpose: To introduce the Zoho brand, showcase its extensive suite of business software products, build user trust, and serve as the primary entry point for users to explore products, sign up for services, or sign into their accounts.

businessEntities.name: App
businessEntities.description: Represents an individual software application offered by Zoho.

businessEntities.name: Suite
businessEntities.description: A collection of bundled Zoho applications that serve a broader business function.

businessEntities.name: Product Category
businessEntities.description: A business function that groups related applications, such as Sales, Marketing, or Finance.

businessEntities.name: Customer
businessEntities.description: Represents the businesses and users who use Zoho's products.

businessEntities.name: Partner
businessEntities.description: Represents third-party companies or individuals who work with Zoho to sell or implement its products.

clickableElements.label: English
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Opens a menu or dropdown with a list of available languages for the user to select.

clickableElements.label: Previous
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Shows the previous item in a sequence of content, likely customer testimonials or featured products.

clickableElements.label: Next
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Shows the next item in a sequence of content, likely customer testimonials or featured products.

clickableElements.label: search
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Submits the text entered in the search form and navigates the user to a search results page.

clickableElements.label: Skip to main content
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Moves the user's focus from the header to the main content area of the page.

clickableElements.label: Zoho.com
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Reloads the homepage or navigates to the root domain.

clickableElements.label: Enterprise
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Navigates to a page detailing Zoho's offerings for large businesses.

clickableElements.label: Customer Stories
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Navigates to a page showcasing case studies and stories from Zoho's customers.

clickableElements.label: User Community
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Navigates to the Zoho community forums where users can ask questions and share information.

clickableElements.label: Training and Certification
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Navigates to a portal for user training, courses, and certification programs.

clickableElements.label: Affiliate Program
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Navigates to a page with information on how to become a Zoho affiliate partner.

clickableElements.label: Work With a Partner
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Navigates to a page to search for or connect with official Zoho partners.

clickableElements.label: Become a Partner
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Navigates to a page with information on the benefits and requirements of becoming a Zoho partner.

clickableElements.label: Developer Center
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Navigates to the developer portal with APIs, SDKs, and documentation.

clickableElements.label: Blog
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Navigates to the official Zoho blog.

clickableElements.label: Knowledge Base
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Navigates to the help and support documentation portal.

clickableElements.label: Contact Us
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Navigates to a page with contact details for sales, support, and other departments.

clickableElements.label: Español
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Reloads the website in the Spanish language.

clickableElements.label: Sign In
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Navigates the user to the login page.

clickableElements.label: Sign Up
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Navigates the user to the account registration page.

clickableElements.label: Get Started
clickableElements.businessIntent: Create a new user account or start a trial
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Navigates the user to the account registration or product selection page.

clickableElements.label: Apps
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Navigates to a section or page listing all of Zoho's individual software applications.

clickableElements.label: Suites
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Navigates to a section or page listing all of Zoho's bundled software suites.

clickableElements.label: Platforms
clickableElements.businessIntent: View all developer or business platforms
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Navigates to a section or page listing Zoho's platform offerings like Zoho One.

clickableElements.label: EXPLORE ALL PRODUCTS
clickableElements.businessIntent: Navigate to the main product listing page
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Takes the user to a comprehensive page that lists all available Zoho products.

clickableElements.label: Try now
clickableElements.businessIntent: Start a trial for a specific product
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Navigates to a sign-up page to start a trial for the associated product (e.g., Vertical Studio, ERP).

clickableElements.label: CRM
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Navigates to the product detail page for Zoho CRM.

clickableElements.label: Books
clickableElements.businessIntent: Learn about the Books accounting product
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Navigates to the product detail page for Zoho Books.

clickableElements.label: Mail
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Navigates to the product detail page for Zoho Mail.

clickableElements.label: TRY ZOHO ONE
clickableElements.businessIntent: Start a trial for the Zoho One suite
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Navigates to the sign-up or detail page for the Zoho One platform.

clickableElements.label: EXPLORE MARKETPLACE
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Navigates to the Zoho Marketplace to find apps and extensions.

clickableElements.label: Sign Up Now
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Navigates the user to the account registration page.

clickableElements.label: READ THE STORY
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Navigates to a detailed page about a specific customer's success story.

clickableElements.label: Learn more
clickableElements.businessIntent: Get more information on a topic
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Navigates to a page with more details, in this case about enterprise solutions.

clickableElements.label: Read our story
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Navigates to a page detailing the history and mission of Zoho.

clickableElements.label: sales@zohocorp.com
clickableElements.businessIntent: Contact the sales team via email
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Opens the user's default email client with a new message addressed to sales@zohocorp.com.

clickableElements.label: Support
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Navigates to the main support portal.

clickableElements.label: Privacy Policy
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Navigates to the legal page detailing the company's privacy policy.

clickableElements.label: Terms of Service
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Navigates to the legal page detailing the company's terms of service.

clickableElements.label: Sign Up for Free
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Navigates the user to the account registration page.

forms.purpose: To allow users to search the Zoho website for information about products, FAQs, and other content.

fields.businessMeaning: The user's search term or question.

forms.purpose: To allow users to search the Zoho website for information about products, FAQs, and other content.

fields.fieldName: Search for product overviews, FAQs, and more...
fields.businessMeaning: The user's search term or question. The field name appears to be incorrectly extracted from the placeholder text.

forms.purpose: To allow users to search the Zoho website for information, likely in a mobile or secondary view.

fields.businessMeaning: The user's search term or question. The field name appears to be incorrectly extracted from the placeholder text.

workflows.name: New User Registration
steps: User clicks a 'Sign Up', 'Get Started', or 'Try now' link.
User is navigated to a dedicated registration page (not visible).
User fills in their details and submits the form to create a Zoho account.

workflows.name: Existing User Login
steps: User is navigated to a login page (not visible).
User enters their credentials and submits to access their account.

workflows.name: Product Discovery and Exploration
steps: User browses the list of products under categories like 'Sales', 'Marketing', etc.
User clicks on a specific product link (e.g., 'CRM', 'Books') to learn more.
User is navigated to a detailed product information page (not visible).

workflows.name: Site Search
steps: User types a search term into one of the search input fields.
User is navigated to a search results page (not visible) displaying relevant content.
evidence: form field with placeholder: Search for product overviews, FAQs, and more...

userGoals.name: Find a specific software solution
userGoals.description: To identify and learn about a software application that meets a particular business need (e.g., CRM, accounting, project management).
evidence: The page is structured with product categories like 'Sales', 'Marketing', 'Finance', and 'Human Resources'.

userGoals.name: Evaluate Zoho as a software vendor
userGoals.description: To understand the company's values, reputation, and scope of offerings to determine if they are a suitable vendor.
evidence: h2: The core values and principles that drive us

userGoals.name: Start a free trial or sign up
userGoals.description: To create a new account and begin using one or more of Zoho's applications, often for free.
evidence: Multiple prominent links and buttons like 'Sign Up', 'Get Started For Free', and 'Try now'.

userGoals.name: Access an existing account or support
userGoals.description: For returning users to log in to their account or find help and documentation.

predictedMissingUI.purpose: To allow new users to create an account after clicking 'Sign Up' or 'Get Started'.
evidence: The existence of multiple 'Sign Up', 'Get Started', and 'Try now' links strongly implies a dedicated page or modal for account creation.

predictedMissingUI.purpose: To allow existing users to authenticate and access their accounts after clicking 'Sign In'.
evidence: The existence of 'Sign In' links implies a dedicated page or modal for authentication.

predictedMissingUI.purpose: To display the results of a user's query submitted through the search form.
evidence: The presence of a search form and submit button implies that a results page must exist to show the outcome of the search.

predictedMissingUI.purpose: To provide detailed information, features, and pricing for each individual Zoho application.
evidence: The page contains hundreds of links to specific products (e.g., 'CRM', 'Books', 'Mail'); each of these must lead to a dedicated page for that product.

pageNarrative: This page is the main marketing and entry portal for Zoho, a comprehensive business software provider. It presents the company's value proposition and builds trust by highlighting its core principles and showcasing customer stories. The page allows users to explore a vast catalog of over 50 applications, which are neatly organized by business functions such as Sales, Marketing, and Finance. Key user actions are to discover specific products, sign in to an existing account, or sign up for a new account or product trial via numerous calls-to-action. The page also serves as a hub for accessing company information, support resources, and the developer center.
